problem id: 2b50eb88
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(1) AND SHR(4)) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  01010010 -> 00000100
  00100010 -> 00000000
  11100110 -> 00001101
  00000101 -> 00000000
  00011111 -> 00000000
  10010101 -> 00001001
  10100100 -> 00001001
  00100111 -> 00000010
  01011100 -> 00000000

query: 11111011
predicted answer: 00000111
